emulator.title: Defeat the Cataclysm Emulator — the final boss of the Cataclysm chain

emulator_drops.title: Collect the Emulator's rare drops — Cataclysm culmination loot

subtitle.text: The end of the Cataclysm chain. What it emulates is the question.

description: The Emulator is the final boss of L Ender's Cataclysm.
Ancient Remnant → Maledictus → Revenant → Ignis + Annihilator → Emulator.
The Cataclysm chain is now complete.
Every boss in the sequence has been cleared.
What the Emulator 'emulates' is deliberately ambiguous.
Its fight style mimics previous Cataclysm boss patterns
The lore implication: it is the final form of what happens
when pure mechanical mastery achieves its own continuation.
The Rogue Eye in combat form.
